activeSymptoms.plainLanguageMeaning: Possible physical tightening as demand outruns immediately available supply.

activeSymptoms.plainLanguageMeaning: Inflation may be eroding household purchasing power before employment quantities weaken.

monthlyPersistence.note: The monthly result remains a provisional nowcast even when its leading candidate persists. The quarterly clock is the confirmed state.

exceptionalTransition.note: This jump is outside the configured normal predecessor sequence and requires analyst review; the rules do not infer a causal shock.
